Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: Termcraft – terminal-first 2D sandbox survival in Rust 70 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. Mamba-3 269 upvotes, 50 comments
  3. Bayesian statistics for confused data scientists 15 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. ZJIT removes redundant object loads and stores 67 upvotes, 10 comments
  5. Common Lisp Development Tooling 24 upvotes, 2 comments
  6. Electronics for Kids, 2nd Edition 68 upvotes, 12 comments
  7. Show HN: Atomic – self-hosted, semantically-connected personal knowledge base 33 upvotes, 4 comments
  8. Floci – A free, open-source local AWS emulator 17 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. The paddle wheel aircraft carriers of Lake Michigan 26 upvotes, 3 comments
  10. Some things just take time 451 upvotes, 149 comments
  11. Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages 111 upvotes, 31 comments
  12. You can run a DNS server (2025) 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  13. Hide macOS Tahoe's Menu Icons 70 upvotes, 18 comments
  14. Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust 171 upvotes, 56 comments
  15. Professional video editing, right in the browser with WebGPU and WASM 63 upvotes, 18 comments
  16. Do Not Turn Child Protection into Internet Access Control 302 upvotes, 118 comments
  17. How Ford burned $12B in Brazil (2021) 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. Hawaii's worst flooding in 20 years threatens dam, prompts evacuations 50 upvotes, 16 comments
  19. Attempts to post the latest Trivy security incident have been marked [dead] 21 upvotes, 5 comments
  20. Tinybox- offline AI device 120B parameters 219 upvotes, 125 comments
  21. Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning 80 upvotes, 48 comments
  22. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022) 449 upvotes, 347 comments
  23. Books of the Century by Le Monde 89 upvotes, 57 comments
  24. Boomloom: Think with your hands 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. How Invisalign became the biggest user of 3D printers 120 upvotes, 88 comments
  26. No evidence cannabis helps anxiety, depression, or PTSD 119 upvotes, 102 comments
  27. Ubuntu 26.04 Ends 46 Years of Silent sudo Passwords 299 upvotes, 304 comments
  28. Show HN: Joonote – A note-taking app on your lock screen and notification panel 36 upvotes, 27 comments
  29. No Semicolons Needed 28 upvotes, 24 comments
  30. Seam carving with forward energy 5 upvotes, 2 comments
